payload.title: IBM has unveiled chip technology that could help extend Moore’s Law another decade
payload.fact: IBM built a new prototype chip with around 100 billion transistors on an area the size of a fingernail, doubling the transistor density of its previous state-of-the-art technology announced in 2021.
supporting_evidence: IBM has built a new prototype chip with around 100 billion transistors on an area the size of a fingernail
which is twice the density of the company’s previous state-of-the-art technology announced in 2021
